ddls:
CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "vio_code" TEXT /* Code of the violation */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the regulation where the violation is cited */,
  "unit" INTEGER /* Unit number of the violation */,
  "oos" INTEGER /* Whether the violation is out of service (OOS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "included_in_sms" INTEGER /* Whether the violation is included in the Safety Management System (SMS) */,
  "basic_category" TEXT /* Category of the basic violation (e.g., Vehicle Maintenance) */,
  "reason_not_included_sms" TEXT /* Reason for not including the violation in SMS */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the violation */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_location" TEXT /* Location of the inspection */,
  "inspection_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection officer who conducted the inspection */,
  "corrective_action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corrective action taken for the violation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the violation (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_basic_category FOREIGN KEY ("basic_category") REFERENCES basic_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_inspection_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_officer_id") REFERENCES inspection_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_corrective_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("corrective_action_id") REFERENCES corrective_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each basic category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the basic category (e.g., Vehicle Maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the basic category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_basic_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES basic_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., safety manager, maintenance technician, compliance officer) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the violation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "registration_state" TEXT /* State of vehicle registration */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., Active, Inactive, Out of Service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspection officer */,
  "officer_badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the inspection officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the inspection officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspection officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspection officer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the officer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the officer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrective_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the corrective action taken */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the corrective action (e.g., Open, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the action */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the corrective action */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the corrective action was completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
